title: Garlicky Fluffy Brazilian Garlic Bowl
description: A kid-friendly, garlicky Brazilian dish featuring instant yeast and perfect for a weeknight meal. Serve in a traditional lacquerware bowl.

ingredients.name: All-Purpose Flour
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free flour for a gluten-free version.

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the Instant Yeast, All-Purpose Flour, Garlic Powder, Salt, Sugar, and Warm Water.
Mix the ingredients together until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round, flat shape.
Place the dough in a greased 9-inch (23 cm) round baking dish, such as a cast-iron skillet.
Brush the top of the dough with Vegetable Oil, and sprinkle with chopped Fresh Parsley and Sliced Scallions (if using).
Bake the dough for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the baking dish from the oven and sprinkle the top with sliced Garlic, Kosher Salt, Black Pepper, and Flaxseed (if using).
Serve the warm Garlicky Fluffy Brazilian Garlic Bowl in a traditional lacquerware bowl.
Let the remaining dough rest in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours before baking.
